name: teams-mock-service
description: Create MockTeamsService implementing ITeamsService for TDD
acceptanceCriteria: In-memory Maps store organizations, teams, apps, memberships, invitations
Constructor accepts optional delay config for simulating network latency
createOrganization generates UUID, sets createdAt, returns organization
createTeam validates organizationId exists, returns team
createApp validates teamId exists, returns app
addMembership enforces: org membership required before team membership
addMembership enforces: exactly one of organizationId/teamId/appId is set
createInvitation sets expiresAt to 7 days from now by default
acceptInvitation creates Membership and marks invitation accepted
getMembershipsForUser returns all memberships across org/team/app for userId
clear() method resets all storage for test isolation
